name: Seitan Balls with Slow Cooker Spaghetti Sauce
method: Add the oil to a large skillet and heat to medium high. Add the onion and sauté until it is translucent, about 10 to 15 minutes. Turn down the heat to medium and add garlic and cook for 2 more minutes. Add all the ingredients (except the seitan and pasta) to the slow cooker, plus 1½ cups water. Cook on low for 6 to 8 hours, adding the seitan in the last hour. If you want to cook on high, then cook 3 to 4 hours adding the seitan for the last half hour.
Cook the spaghetti according to package directions and serve with seitan pasta sauce.
